articles.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 and S26 Plus review: This again - The Verge
articles.description: Samsung’s latest Galaxy S26 and S26 Plus flagship phones are going through the motions.

articles.title: Xbox hardware teased at GDC, just one week after PC/console hybrid Project Helix was first confirmed - Eurogamer.net
articles.description: Microsoft has posted a set of photos giving us a small teaser for some unspecified work-in-progress Xbox hardware.

articles.title: Oppo’s new foldable isn’t quite creaseless, but it’s pretty damn close - The Verge
articles.description: The Oppo Find N6 has the shallowest crease of any foldable yet, thanks in part to 3D liquid printing in the hinge.

articles.title: Falcom to announce final Trails game during 50th anniversary - Gematsu
articles.description: The latest issue of Weekly Famitsu features a four-page interview with Falcom president Toshihiro Kondo on the company’s 45th anniversary, which it celebrated this week. Kondo discusses the T…

articles.title: Nintendo Shares Rally 10% as New Pokémon Game Lifts Sentiment - Bloomberg
articles.description: Nintendo Co. shares gained as much as 10.5% in their steepest climb since April as the surprise success of its new Pokémon game helped offset worries around rising memory costs.

articles.title: Photographer Tyler Stalman tests the MacBook Neo with pro photo and video workflows - 9to5Mac
articles.description: Watch as Tyler Stalman realizes halfway through the video that the MacBook Neo can handle more demanding workflows than he initially thought.
